title: Hornsea Project Four offshore wind farm: non-material change (2025), Planning Act 2008
body: "Decision by the Secretary of State on an application for a second non-material change relating to an offshore wind farm.  Date of decision  11 April 2025  Company / location   Orsted Hornsea Project Four LimitedOffshore to the east of Hornsea   Type of project / consent requested  Non-material consent under the Planning Act 2008. "

taxons.title: Energy industry and infrastructure licensing and regulation
